Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf Nibbi Brothers Construction, Inc.'S Response To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; Declaration, Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar May-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Zurich American Insurance Company's motion to compel production of documents is granted in part. The Court does not find that plaintiff has waived either the attorney client or attorney work product privilege. However, production of redacted invoices that indicate the identity of the client, the amount of the fee, and the general purpose of the work performed are not privileged and relevant. Entries that reveal litigation strategy or the specific nature of services provided, such as researching particular areas of law, are privileged and need not be disclosed. Plaintiff shall provide responsive invoices, with redactions if necessary, within 15 days of notice of this order. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Set For Trial On Sep-02-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Aug-15-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 604
